title: Die Sterne where can I buy
display_title: Die Sterne where can I buy
wikitext:
[]: Die Sterne - where can I buy?             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Tue Jan 15, 2008 12:05 pm I suppose this isn't really completely off-topic, but I simply wanted to ask if anyone had any idea from where I could purchase a copy of ver 2.0 of Die Sterne. Also, was Die sterne ever printed in English, or is it an exclusively japanese-language item,compared to Der Mond?

[]: Re: Die Sterne - where can I buy?             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jan 15, 2008 1:27 pm Indigo Arcangel wrote: I suppose this isn't really completely off-topic, but I simply wanted to ask if anyone had any idea from where I could purchase a copy of ver 2.0 of Die Sterne. Also, was Die sterne ever printed in English, or is it an exclusively japanese-language item,compared to Der Mond?

[]: Re: Die Sterne - where can I buy?             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Tue Jan 15, 2008 5:54 pm Thanks, but I don't think they ship to the UK. Also, I managed to find out that there IS an English version. Apparently there was a re-release about Four months ago. I recently got Der Mond and I've been looking everywhere for Die Sterne. If anyone can help me find an english copy of Ver 2, that ships to the UK, it would be much appreciated.
